title: Spotify Embed Component
description:
Create a React component for Spotify embeds.

**URL patterns:**
- https://open.spotify.com/track/*
- https://open.spotify.com/album/*
- https://open.spotify.com/playlist/*
- https://open.spotify.com/episode/*

**Implementation:**
- Use Spotify's official iframe embed
- Compact vs full-size options
- Theme matching (Spotify has dark theme option)

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/spotify-embed.tsx

title: Raycast script to publish notes and create PR
description: Create Raycast script that: 1) Runs smart sync, 2) Creates git commit, 3) Pushes to new branch, 4) Opens PR via gh CLI. Should show confirmation dialog with list of notes being published.

title: Embed Infrastructure: URL Detection & Component Routing
description:
Create the core infrastructure for detecting embeddable URLs and routing them to appropriate React components. **Approach options:** 1. **html-react-parser level** (recommended): Extend note-content-interactive.tsx to detect embed URLs in or

tags and replace with React components. Keeps markdown pipeline clean. 2. **remark/rehype plugin**: Create custom plugins to transform URLs during markdown processing. More complex but catches URLs earlier. **Implementation:** - Create EmbedRegistry to map URL patterns → React components - Add embed detection in note-content-interactive.tsx options.replace() - Support both standalone URLs (paragraph with just a link) and inline links - Lazy load embed components for performance - Graceful fallback to regular links if embed fails **Files to modify:** - components/note-content-interactive.tsx - New: lib/embeds/registry.ts - New: components/embeds/embed-wrapper.tsx

title: Fix published field: use boolean with published_at date
description: published field is inconsistent (boolean vs empty vs date). Need to: 1) Set published as boolean (true/false), 2) Use published_at for date, 3) Fix templates and vault notes, 4) Update filtering logic

title: Restore two-vault architecture in smart-sync.py (reverted by bd sync)
description: Commit 13175ad (bd sync) accidentally reverted smart-sync.py back to single-vault version. Need to restore the two-vault implementation from 595dfcd.

title: Em-dash note (—) returns 404 on deployed site
description: The — note exists and builds correctly (—.html generated), but returns 404 on the deployed site. Likely a URL encoding issue with the em-dash character (U+2014) in the slug. May need to URL-encode the slug or use a different character.

title: Strip xo-specific tags from published notes
description: Remove #posts, #0🌲 (and other xo-vault-specific tags) from notes before publishing to frontend

title: Verify #posts and #0🌲 tags are stripped from published notes
description: We implemented tag stripping in front-3vt but need to verify it's working. Check that XO_SPECIFIC_TAGS includes posts and 0🌲 emoji, and that they're being removed during sync.

title: Table styling missing in prose content
description: No table styling defined in .prose CSS (app/globals.css). Tailwind's reset removes default table borders and cell padding. Tables render but lack visual structure. Fix: Add .prose table, .prose th, .prose td styles with appropriate borders, padding, and background colors.

title: Create Obsidian base for published notes in xo vault
Implement two-vault publishing with stub note generation
description: Update smart-sync.py: Parse wikilinks, auto-generate stubs for unpublished refs with template (published: false, stub: true), add source_note link back to xo. Update vault.ts: filter published: false. Update publish-notes.sh: two-stage sync (xo→research-notes→frontend). Show warnings for created stubs. See context around message 130352 for full architecture.

title: Sync script not finding notes with #to-publish tag
description: User added #to-publish tag to notes in xo vault but smart-sync.py is not finding them. Need to investigate why find_notes_to_publish() is not detecting these tagged notes.

title: Test improved hover previews locally before deploying
description:
Changes made to hover previews:
- Now shows first 1-2 paragraphs (~300 chars) of note content
- Strips markdown formatting to show plain text
- Wider tooltip (w-80 vs w-72)
- Smaller text (text-xs) to fit more content
- Preserves paragraph breaks with whitespace-pre-line

TO TEST:
1. Run dev server: pnpm dev
2. Navigate to any note with wikilinks
3. Hover over internal links to see preview
4. Verify:
   - Shows actual content, not just summary
   - Text is readable and well-formatted
   - Length is appropriate (not too long/short)
   - Markdown is properly stripped

Files changed:
- components/note-content-interactive.tsx

Once testing looks good, close this bead and the changes can be pushed.

Related: front-ru1

title: Remove console logs from production code
Research bidirectional sync xo ↔ research-notes
description: For future: Enable editing in research-notes and syncing back to xo. Needs: change detection, conflict resolution, preserve private content. Start without it, add later if needed. Could use last_modified timestamps or sync-back flag.

title: Smart sync: Only sync notes tagged with #to-publish
description: Update sync-vault.sh to: 1) Find notes with #to-publish tag in frontmatter, 2) Copy only those notes, 3) Update frontmatter to mark as published (remove #to-publish, add published: true + published_at date), 4) Support both initial publish and updates

title: Enable image optimization or document strategy
Add error boundaries and loading states
Run accessibility audit and fix issues
Clean up or delete broken integrate-vault branch
Remove ignoreBuildErrors and fix TypeScript errors
Note summary not displaying on site despite being in frontmatter
description: Dukkha note has summary field in frontmatter but it's not showing up on the site in note cards

title: Add SEO essentials: robots.txt, sitemap, Open Graph tags
Adopt proper beads workflow with feature branches
description: Currently working directly on main which conflicts with beads worktree model. Need to: 1) Document the proper workflow 2) Create a feature branch for current work 3) Update hooks/docs to remind about feature branch workflow

title: Bullet points don't render in prose content
description: Tailwind's preflight CSS reset removes list-style-type from ul/ol elements. The .prose styles in app/globals.css (lines 213-221) add padding-left but don't re-enable bullet markers. Fix: Add list-style-type: disc for ul and list-style-type: decimal for ol in the .prose styles.

title: CodePen/CodeSandbox Embed Components
description:
Create React components for code playground embeds.

**URL patterns:**
- https://codepen.io/*/*
- https://codesandbox.io/s/*
- https://codesandbox.io/p/*

**Features:**
- Responsive iframe embeds
- Lazy loading
- Default to result view vs code view option
- Theme matching where possible

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/codepen-embed.tsx
- New: components/embeds/codesandbox-embed.tsx

title: Generic Open Graph Link Preview Component
description:
Create a fallback rich link preview for URLs that don't have specific embed handlers.

**Features:**
- Fetch Open Graph metadata (title, description, image, site name)
- Render as a card with image, title, description, favicon, domain
- Cache OG data to avoid repeated fetches
- Handle missing metadata gracefully

**Implementation considerations:**
- OG fetching must happen server-side (CORS)
- Could use API route or build-time fetching
- Consider og-image services as fallback

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/link-preview.tsx
- New: app/api/og/route.ts (or lib/og-fetcher.ts for build-time)

title: Rich Embeds System for Markdown Content
description: Transform plain URLs and embed syntax into rich, interactive React components within markdown content. This includes tweets, YouTube videos, GitHub content, and more. The system should detect embeddable URLs and render appropriate React components while maintaining the existing unified/remark/rehype + html-react-parser architecture.

title: Image Lightbox & Gallery Embeds
description: Enhance image handling in markdown with lightbox functionality. **Features:** - Click to expand images in a modal/lightbox - Keyboard navigation (arrow keys, escape) - Zoom capability - Gallery mode for multiple images in sequence - Preserve alt text as captions **Implementation:** - Detect tags in html-react-parser - Wrap with lightbox component - Use existing Radix Dialog or similar **Files:** - New: components/embeds/image-lightbox.tsx

title: External links should open in new tab
description: Add target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' to external links in markdown processing

title: Update package.json metadata (name, description, etc)
YouTube Video Embed Component
description:
Create a React component for embedding YouTube videos.

**URL patterns:**
- https://youtube.com/watch?v=*
- https://youtu.be/*
- https://youtube.com/embed/*

**Implementation:**
- Responsive iframe embed
- Lazy load (don't load iframe until in viewport or clicked)
- Show thumbnail preview with play button overlay initially
- Privacy-enhanced mode option (youtube-nocookie.com)
- Support start time parameters (?t=)

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/youtube-embed.tsx

title: Add error tracking with Sentry
Wikilinks to unpublished/stub notes render as valid links
description: In app/notes/[slug]/page.tsx, availableNotes is set to all notes from getAllNotes(), which includes stub files (published: false, stub: true). The wikilink resolver in lib/markdown.ts marks links as broken only if the target slug isn't in availableNotes. Since stubs exist as files, links to them appear valid but lead to placeholder content. Example: Dukkha links to Four Thousand Weeks, Everything changes, Every step is the goal - all stubs. Fix: Filter availableNotes to exclude stubs or notes with published: false.

title: Parse About page from About.md in Obsidian vault instead of hardcoding
description: Modify sync-vault.sh to sync About.md from root of obsidian vault. Update about/page.tsx to read from synced About.md file instead of hardcoded content.

title: Line break appears before internal links in note content
description: There's an unwanted line break immediately before internal wikilinks in multiple notes. May be caused by how note-content-interactive.tsx splits and reassembles HTML with dangerouslySetInnerHTML spans, or CSS styling on .internal-link class.

title: About page should read directly from research-notes/About.md
description: Currently About.md was copied to content/ but not parsed. The about page should dynamically read from research-notes vault About.md file and process it through the markdown pipeline.

title: Mastodon/Fediverse Post Embed
description:
Create a React component for Mastodon and Fediverse post embeds.

**URL patterns:**
- https://*.social/@*/[id]
- https://mastodon.*/@*/[id]
- Various Fediverse instance patterns

**Features:**
- Display post content, author, avatar
- Handle boosts/reblogs
- Media attachments
- Content warnings (spoiler text)
- Link to original post

**Challenges:**
- Many different instance domains
- May need pattern heuristics or OEmbed discovery

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/mastodon-embed.tsx

title: Twitter/X Tweet Embed Component
description:
Create a React component that renders tweets beautifully.

**URL patterns to detect:**
- https://twitter.com/*/status/*
- https://x.com/*/status/*

**Options:**
1. **Twitter's official embed** (react-twitter-widgets or similar): Uses Twitter's iframe, handles styling, replies, media automatically. Requires client-side JS.
2. **Custom static render**: Fetch tweet data via API, render custom UI. More control, better performance, but needs API access and maintenance.
3. **Hybrid**: Static render with link to full tweet. No API needed.

**Requirements:**
- Match site's dark/light theme
- Show author, avatar, text, media, timestamp, engagement counts
- Link to original tweet
- Handle quoted tweets, threads, media (images/video)
- Loading state while fetching/rendering
- Error state with fallback to plain link

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/tweet-embed.tsx

title: Migrate from old website: ensure old links resolve
description: Make sure all old links from x25bd.com still resolve on johnx.co. Example: x25bd.com/posts/notes-on-location-proofs -> johnx.co/.../notes-on-location-proofs. Eventually will redirect old site entirely, but start with research notes, write content, then wind down old site.

title: Long URLs overflow hover preview popup
description: In the hover preview popup (HoverCardContent), raw URLs like tweet links bleed past the edge of the popup container. The HoverCardContent in note-content-interactive.tsx needs overflow-hidden and word-break/overflow-wrap styling to handle long URLs.

title: Improve hover previews: show first paragraphs instead of just summary
description:
Current hover tooltips only show the summary field (3 lines). Should show actual note content - first 1-2 paragraphs or ~200-300 chars of the note body.

This gives users a better preview of the note content before clicking through.

Changes needed:
- Extract plain text or first few paragraphs from note content
- Display in hover card instead of just summary
- Keep reasonable length (maybe 200-300 chars or 2-3 paragraphs max)
- Maintain good formatting/readability

title: Reconfigure beads for proper sync branch workflow
description: Current setup has sync-branch=main which causes worktree conflicts. Need to: 1) Change sync-branch to beads-metadata, 2) Remove worktree, 3) Let beads recreate it, 4) Get back on main

title: Configure security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc)
GitHub Embed Components (Gists, Repos, Code)
description:
Create React components for GitHub content.

**URL patterns:**
- https://github.com/*/*  (repos)
- https://gist.github.com/*/*  (gists)
- https://github.com/*/*/blob/*  (file links)

**Features:**
- **Repo cards**: Show repo name, description, stars, forks, language
- **Gist embeds**: Render code with syntax highlighting
- **File snippets**: Show code from specific file/lines

**Implementation options:**
- GitHub API for repo metadata
- Embed gist via script or fetch raw content
- Use existing syntax highlighting if available

**Files:**
- New: components/embeds/github-repo-embed.tsx
- New: components/embeds/github-gist-embed.tsx

title: Fix: PR should be created directly, not draft/web form
description: publish-notes.sh uses --web flag which opens browser form instead of creating PR. Should create PR directly and open for review/merge.

title: Add custom 404 page
Stub notes appearing on live site (should be filtered)
description: Notes with published:false or stub:true are appearing on the site. Need to verify vault.ts filtering is working correctly.
